channel.title: Kaoto on Apache Camel
channel.description: Recent content in Kaoto on Apache Camel

item.title: Kaoto v2.0 TP1 release
item.description: Introducing Kaoto 2.0 (Tech Preview) - A New Chapter for the Kaoto Project We are thrilled to announce the first tech preview release of Kaoto 2.0, marking a significant milestone in the evolution of the Kaoto project. Kaoto is a no-code / low-code editor for Apache Camel integrations, which lets you create and edit your routes in a graphical way. Highlights A lot of effort has been put into bringing the Kaoto project closer to Apache Camel.
